description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job running in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, and installs various packages, checks out the repository, prepares the build environment, and then runs cmake, make, and make install with custom CMAKE_ARGS. The workflow also sends a notification to a Matrix room on success or failure.
